signatures: modify(primitiveId: string | IPCB_PrimitivePolyline, property: {         net?: string;         layer?: TPCB_LayersOfLine;         polygon?: IPCB_Polygon;         lineWidth?: number;         primitiveLock?: boolean;     }): Promise<IPCB_PrimitivePolyline | undefined>
classSummary: PCB & 封装 / 折线图元类

params.name: property
